hero.label: Backend Developer · Java · REST APIs
hero.name: Pyetro
hero.description: Backend Developer focused on building scalable APIs, software architecture and databases. Hands-on experience with Java, Spring Boot, MySQL and server-side development best practices.

about.label: About me
about.title: Building backend systems from an early age
about.paragraph1: I'm 17 years old and already working in a corporate environment as a Young Apprentice at CRAFT Multimodal, balancing professional routine with high school and technical IT training.
about.paragraph2: My journey started in infrastructure and support, but quickly evolved to server-side software development, focusing on application architecture and building organized systems.
about.paragraph3: Today I specialize in backend development: REST API design, database modeling, authentication/authorization, and project organization following patterns like MVC and SOLID principles.
about.card1_content: Java · Spring Boot · REST APIs · MySQL

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Professional background

experience.achievement2: Contact with real demands and operational flow

projects.label: Projects

projects.project1_feature1: MVC architecture with separation of concerns
projects.project1_feature2: Data persistence with JDBC and prepared statements
